_doc: Fixture set for a troubleshoot replay scenario; mock dispatcher data only — do not treat this file as investigation evidence.

rules._doc: Both tenant folders have zero queues; one empty fixture serves every queue listing.
Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
